raw_data.name: Palm Berries

popular_times.title: Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets

posts.body: Find a tropical moment in Matthews, where vibrant flavors and handcrafted smoothies make breakfast, takeout, or family-friendly dining feel like a mini celebration. Build your own bowl, taste our seasonal specials, and stop in to explore the full menu and flavors.

raw_data.subtypes: Restaurant, Dessert restaurant, Health food store

reviews_data.owner_answer: We're so happy to hear you had a fantastic time at Palm Berries! Liliana is awesome, and we're delighted she made a great impression. It's wonderful you loved the samples and vibes. We can't wait to welcome you back soon! 🌸
reviews_data.review_text: The young woman who helped us was phenomenal! Her name was Liliana and when we were unsure about our base flavor she allowed us to try some samples. Overall a 10/10 experience, the food was awesome, staff was efficient and caring, and good vibes were there.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We truly appreciate your wonderful feedback! It's heartening to know you enjoyed our tropical setting and Açai bowls. We're excited for you to try our smoothie blends on your next visit. Thanks for choosing Palm Berries as your new favorite spot!

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text:
Fantastic experience here! Love the vibe (very tropical feel to the place) and will be my new favorite spot. The Açai bowls are just like the kind you'd find in Brazil and the customizations will make it so no matter your palate, you'll find what you're looking for.  Also on the menu are smoothie blends, which I'll definitely be trying next

Fast, friendly staff and convenient - I LOVE IT!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your positive review! We're delighted to hear that you had a good experience with us. We look forward to serving you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Good

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your wonderful feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your first visit and that the Protein Bowl and our approach to fresh, healthy ingredients met your expectations. It's great to know that you felt energized and appreciated the atmosphere and service provided. We're dedicated to offering meals that are both nutritious and delicious. We look forward to welcoming you back soon for another enjoyable experience!
reviews_data.review_text:
I've always believed that healthy food and delicious food should be the same thing, and Palm Berries absolutely delivers.
Today was my first visit and I ordered the Protein Bowl. Fresh is the first word that comes to mind. Every ingredient tasted like it had just been prepared, and the flavors worked perfectly together. The regular size was so generous that I couldn't even finish it all and ended up taking the rest home for breakfast tomorrow.
What I appreciated most was that it felt like real food. Not processed, not heavy, not something that leaves you regretting your decision an hour later. Just fresh, clean, flavorful ingredients that leave you feeling energized instead of weighed down.
The staff was friendly, the atmosphere was welcoming, and the entire experience felt intentional and well done.
If you're looking for a healthy meal, post-workout recovery, or just something different from the usual fast-food options, Palm Berries is absolutely worth a visit.
Fresh. Delicious. Filling. I'll definitely be back.

Ken, we are so sorry for this experience and would love to address these issues and make it up to you!

Please reach out to us at adil@palmberriesnc.com and let us make this better! Hope to hear from you soon
reviews_data.review_text: I absolutely love Palm Berries down since the day they open, but as of lately, the quality of the bowl hasn’t been great. I’ve been getting bad strawberries The past three times that I’ve gone that are mushy and have a taste (they’ve clearly gone bad) , My order has been missing granola and I found hair in my bowl.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to hear that you enjoyed your experience overall. We understand your concern about the granola and appreciate your suggestion. We look forward to serving you again soon, and we're more than happy to customize your order to better suit your preferences.
reviews_data.review_text: I would’ve left five stars, but the layer of granola was like biting rocks. Other than that it was good, next time I’ll ask for no granola.

reviews_data.review_text:
This place is dangerously addictive. Like “I’ll just stop in once” turns into “why am I here again this week?” real fast. Palm Berries is bright, tropical, and ridiculously cute.

I got the Palm Bowl and it did not disappoint. Fresh, perfectly balanced, and honestly just hits every time.

But Leyla and Aleana? Absolute dream team. They’re fast without rushing, super friendly without being fake, and somehow keep everything running smooth while still joking and having fun. It’s like watching a well-oiled smoothie machine with great personalities 😂

You can tell they actually care and know what they’re doing, which makes the whole experience even better.

10/10… but also slightly mad about how often I’m about to spend money here now.

I come here all the time and it never disappoints! This is hands down one of my favorite spots for açaí bowls and smoothies.

They have such a wide variety of options, and I love how easy it is to swap out ingredients to make exactly what I’m craving. Whether I want something fruity, protein-packed, or lighter, they always have something that works.
Definitely my go to spot !

reviews_data.review_text:
Palm Berries is absolutely amazing! The quality and freshness of their ingredients really stand out—you can tell everything is made with care. The bowls are delicious, perfectly blended, and consistently flavorful. The toppings are always fresh, generous, and beautifully presented.

The staff is friendly, welcoming, and provides great customer service, which makes the experience even better. The atmosphere is clean, vibrant, and inviting, making it a great spot to relax or grab something healthy on the go.

If you’re looking for a refreshing, nutritious, and satisfying treat, Palm Berries is definitely the place to go. Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our service, ambiance, and our delicious bowls. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

Emily was an incredibly kind and hardworking employee and her positive attitude truly stood out. From the moment customers walked in, she greeted everyone with a warm smile and made sure they felt welcome and taken care of. She was patient, attentive, and always willing to help, whether it was explaining menu options or making sure each order was done just right. Emily worked efficiently while still being friendly, creating a pleasant experience Her professionalism and genuine kindness made a big difference, and she was a big reason people enjoyed coming back.
This place is amazing! We are excited that this place opened up so close to our office. We’ll be sending our patients your way! Welcome to the neighborhood!

Love Palm Berries Matthews
The atmosphere is so welcoming, the flavors are fresh and delicious, and the customer service is absolutely wonderful. You can really tell they care about quality and their customers. Highly recommend!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: Tried Palm Berries in Matthews and was honestly impressed. The açaí base tasted fresh and not overly sweet (which is rare), and the fruit and toppings were generous and actually ripe — not frozen mush. Everything tasted clean and balanced, not sugary or artificial. The store itself was so clean and the aesthetics are cute! Will definitely be coming again !
Matthews has been long overdue for a good, cozy acai spot! This will make for a great addition to the community!
Bring your kiddos!!! I built my own bowl and so many options to choose from :O. Plus, the vibes are, as the kids say, *immaculate*.
Hands down, the best açaí and smoothie place I’ve ever been! The customer service is amazing, and the bowls are to die for🤤
best acai bowls ive had 😍 10/10 customer service will definitely be returning.

Love love love Palm Berries! This location has the sweetest owners and they are so welcoming! And their snowbowl is my favorite. Switch out bananas for kiwi- game changer! I recommend this spot and the one in concord! I don’t feel guilty taking the kids out for dessert since it’s so healthy! Kids love it. Win win!!!
The best bowls! I bring my boys here all the time. Highly recommend The Biscoff Bowl and A Create Your Own with Pure Base, Strawberries, Bananas, Peanut Butter and cacao nibs!!!
Very fresh and great customer service!

My go-to açaí place! Absolutely love the vibe and atmosphere. Their portions and quality of their bowls are amazing for the price and tastes so good. Also shout out to Adil at the Matthews location! He was very welcoming and friendly adding to the great experience of Palm Berries :)

Out of all the acai bow places I have had in Charlotte, Palm Berries is the best. They are consistent with their portions and they never skimp on either the base or toppings. Besides the food, the atmosphere is always a vibe. Love this place and would like for locations to open all over North Carolina so that I can get this anywhere. Shout out to Adil for his amazing service in the Matthews location.
Love coming here!
Palm berries is my favorite! Great portions 🙂
amazing costumer service and delicious açaí
Fresh acai bowls and great customer service. Has a unique look inside the store that made me feel like I'm on vacation
Really delicious smoothies
Great vibes! I got the Greensip with vegan protein and it is such a good combo! Their bowls are also very good I would recommend the Dubai🫐

posts.body: Find a tropical moment in Matthews, where vibrant flavors and handcrafted smoothies make breakfast, takeout, or family-friendly dining feel like a mini celebration. Build your own bowl, taste our seasonal specials, and stop in to explore the full menu and flavors.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We're so happy to hear you had a fantastic time at Palm Berries! Liliana is awesome, and we're delighted she made a great impression. It's wonderful you loved the samples and vibes. We can't wait to welcome you back soon! 🌸
reviews_data.review_text: The young woman who helped us was phenomenal! Her name was Liliana and when we were unsure about our base flavor she allowed us to try some samples. Overall a 10/10 experience, the food was awesome, staff was efficient and caring, and good vibes were there.

reviews_data.review_text:
Fantastic experience here! Love the vibe (very tropical feel to the place) and will be my new favorite spot. The Açai bowls are just like the kind you'd find in Brazil and the customizations will make it so no matter your palate, you'll find what you're looking for.  Also on the menu are smoothie blends, which I'll definitely be trying next

Fast, friendly staff and convenient - I LOVE IT!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your positive review! We're delighted to hear that you had a good experience with us. We look forward to serving you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Good

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your wonderful feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your first visit and that the Protein Bowl and our approach to fresh, healthy ingredients met your expectations. It's great to know that you felt energized and appreciated the atmosphere and service provided. We're dedicated to offering meals that are both nutritious and delicious. We look forward to welcoming you back soon for another enjoyable experience!
reviews_data.review_text:
I've always believed that healthy food and delicious food should be the same thing, and Palm Berries absolutely delivers.
Today was my first visit and I ordered the Protein Bowl. Fresh is the first word that comes to mind. Every ingredient tasted like it had just been prepared, and the flavors worked perfectly together. The regular size was so generous that I couldn't even finish it all and ended up taking the rest home for breakfast tomorrow.
What I appreciated most was that it felt like real food. Not processed, not heavy, not something that leaves you regretting your decision an hour later. Just fresh, clean, flavorful ingredients that leave you feeling energized instead of weighed down.
The staff was friendly, the atmosphere was welcoming, and the entire experience felt intentional and well done.
If you're looking for a healthy meal, post-workout recovery, or just something different from the usual fast-food options, Palm Berries is absolutely worth a visit.
Fresh. Delicious. Filling. I'll definitely be back.

reviews_data.review_text:
This place is dangerously addictive. Like “I’ll just stop in once” turns into “why am I here again this week?” real fast. Palm Berries is bright, tropical, and ridiculously cute.

I got the Palm Bowl and it did not disappoint. Fresh, perfectly balanced, and honestly just hits every time.

But Leyla and Aleana? Absolute dream team. They’re fast without rushing, super friendly without being fake, and somehow keep everything running smooth while still joking and having fun. It’s like watching a well-oiled smoothie machine with great personalities 😂

You can tell they actually care and know what they’re doing, which makes the whole experience even better.

10/10… but also slightly mad about how often I’m about to spend money here now.

Palm Berries is absolutely amazing! The quality and freshness of their ingredients really stand out—you can tell everything is made with care. The bowls are delicious, perfectly blended, and consistently flavorful. The toppings are always fresh, generous, and beautifully presented.

The staff is friendly, welcoming, and provides great customer service, which makes the experience even better. The atmosphere is clean, vibrant, and inviting, making it a great spot to relax or grab something healthy on the go.

If you’re looking for a refreshing, nutritious, and satisfying treat, Palm Berries is definitely the place to go. Highly recommend!

From the moment customers walked in, she greeted everyone with a warm smile and made sure they felt welcome and taken care of. She was patient, attentive, and always willing to help, whether it was explaining menu options or making sure each order was done just right. review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: Tried Palm Berries in Matthews and was honestly impressed. The açaí base tasted fresh and not overly sweet (which is rare), and the fruit and toppings were generous and actually ripe — not frozen mush. Everything tasted clean and balanced, not sugary or artificial. The store itself was so clean and the aesthetics are cute! Will definitely be coming again !
Matthews has been long overdue for a good, cozy acai spot! This will make for a great addition to the community!
Bring your kiddos!!! I built my own bowl and so many options to choose from :O. Plus, the vibes are, as the kids say, *immaculate*.
Hands down, the best açaí and smoothie place I’ve ever been! The customer service is amazing, and the bowls are to die for🤤
best acai bowls ive had 😍 10/10 customer service will definitely be returning.

Love love love Palm Berries! This location has the sweetest owners and they are so welcoming! And their snowbowl is my favorite. Switch out bananas for kiwi- game changer! I recommend this spot and the one in concord! I don’t feel guilty taking the kids out for dessert since it’s so healthy! Kids love it. Win win!!!
The best bowls! I bring my boys here all the time. Highly recommend The Biscoff Bowl and A Create Your Own with Pure Base, Strawberries, Bananas, Peanut Butter and cacao nibs!!!
Very fresh and great customer service!

My go-to açaí place! Absolutely love the vibe and atmosphere. Their portions and quality of their bowls are amazing for the price and tastes so good. Also shout out to Adil at the Matthews location! He was very welcoming and friendly adding to the great experience of Palm Berries :)

Out of all the acai bow places I have had in Charlotte, Palm Berries is the best. They are consistent with their portions and they never skimp on either the base or toppings. Besides the food, the atmosphere is always a vibe. Love this place and would like for locations to open all over North Carolina so that I can get this anywhere. Shout out to Adil for his amazing service in the Matthews location.
Love coming here!
Palm berries is my favorite! Great portions 🙂
amazing costumer service and delicious açaí
Fresh acai bowls and great customer service. Has a unique look inside the store that made me feel like I'm on vacation
Really delicious smoothies
Great vibes! I got the Greensip with vegan protein and it is such a good combo! Their bowls are also very good I would recommend the Dubai🫐
Amazing açaí bowl, the employees were really welcoming!
best bowl i ever had emily h ate with these bowlsssss

This place was delicious! Best açaí my wife andI have ever had! The space was nicely decorated and the staff and owners were very friendly as well!
I love their Dubai chocolate bowl!!! Their space is cute, cozy and clean plus they have the kindest staff members☺️
first time in, protein bowl too good. 10/10 and for the quantity of the bowl for it’s price is actually reasonable. good portions. Not too mention good customer service. Owner was kind!
Highly recommend the Dubai Chocolate Bowl!!!
I’m obsessed with Palm Berries! I will go to every single location they have in Charlotte. There’s no better açaí bowl place than this one!
This gem just opened in Matthews today, and OMG!!!! The best Acai bowl I’ve ever had with such a cute atmosphere!!!!

I had a great experience at Palm Berries here in Matthews NC. The owners and staffs were very welcoming, the portions were generous, and everything tasted really good. It was my first time trying a bowl like this and it was so refreshing. I had the Dragon Bowl for dine-in and the Protein Bowl to go l, both were delicious. I’d definitely recommend stopping by!
